message:
✨ Migrate Compute dashboard to DashboardPage component (#479)

Reduces Compute.tsx from 611 lines to 310 lines (49% reduction) by
using the unified DashboardPage component with beforeCards prop.

Changes:
- Remove SortableComputeCard, ComputeDragPreviewCard components
- Remove DnD imports and manual setup
- Remove useDashboard destructuring and modal handling
- Use beforeCards prop for cluster comparison section
- Preserve all compute stats and comparison logic

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
